archetype: 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with 1 (Organic & Earthy) - Custom 'Oceanic Learning' theme
rationale: Edu Plus targets 8th-grade Romanian students preparing for the National Evaluation. The design must be friendly, approachable, and encouraging. The requested blue color palette and wave shapes naturally align with a soft, fluid, oceanic aesthetic. This reduces test anxiety while remaining trustworthy for parents.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900

spacing_and_layout.general: Use generous spacing. Containers and sections should breathe. Default section padding is py-20 md:py-32.
spacing_and_layout.card_padding: p-8 or p-10 to feel premium and roomy.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Extreme roundness to match 'wave' theme. rounded-3xl for cards, rounded-full for buttons and badges.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Soft, diffused ambient shadows with a cool tint. shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(37,99,235,0.06)] for standard cards. Hover states use deeper, lifted shadows.
spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: Use bento grid styles for the student dashboard. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.

wave_patterns.implementation: Use SVG shapes for section dividers. The hero section must end with a large, soft blue SVG wave dividing it from the next white section. Cards and containers can utilize `clip-path` or CSS masks for subtle wavy edges if desired, but primarily rely on overlapping elements and rounded-3xl corners.
wave_patterns.divider_colors: Transition from bg-blue-50 to bg-white via an SVG wave.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold shadow-md hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-blue-700 transition-all focus:ring-4 focus:ring-blue-300
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-blue-600 border-2 border-blue-100 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold hover:border-blue-300 hover:bg-blue-50 transition-all
buttons.accent: bg-amber-400 text-slate-900 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold shadow-md hover:bg-amber-500 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all

cards.default: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgb(0,0,0,0.02)] p-8 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgb(37,99,235,0.08)]

leaderboard.top_1: bg-amber-50 border-amber-200 text-amber-900 with a gold badge
leaderboard.top_2: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 text-slate-700 with a silver badge
leaderboard.top_3: bg-orange-50 border-orange-200 text-orange-800 with a bronze badge
leaderboard.row: flex items-center justify-between p-4 rounded-2xl bg-white border border-slate-100 mb-3

inputs.text: w-full rounded-2xl border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-4 py-3 text-slate-900 focus:border-blue-500 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 transition-all

home.hero: Soft blue gradient background (bg-blue-50 to bg-white) overlapping into a wave SVG divider. Big, encouraging headline. Two buttons: 'Incepe Evaluarea Gratuita' and 'Vezi Pachete'.
home.features: Bento grid layout highlighting AI strategy, Leaderboard, and Expert Teachers.
home.cta: Bottom section with a deep blue background (bg-slate-900) and wave top-divider, encouraging immediate sign-up.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (or top nav) + Main content area. Background bg-slate-50.
dashboard.widgets: Welcome back message. Progress ring for Romanian/Math. Next recommended AI test. Recent history. Leaderboard mini-widget.

team.layout: Grid of professor profiles. Large friendly images, rounded-3xl, with their specialty and a fun fact to make them approachable.

packages.layout: 3-tier pricing table. Middle tier ('Recomandat') highlighted with border-blue-500, shadow-xl, and a 'Popular' badge. Clear breakdown of features (Evaluare initiala, Strategie AI, etc.).

hero_student.description: Happy student studying, usable for hero or feature section

testing.requirements: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Examples: data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='login-form-submit', data-testid='pricing-tier-card'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure global fonts Outfit and DM Sans are imported via Google Fonts in index.html or global css.
Use lucide-react for icons (graduation-cap, wave-icon, user, trophy, bar-chart).
Implement the SVGs for wave shapes using raw SVG paths directly in the JSX or custom CSS masks to avoid external dependencies.
For Shadcn components, override the default border radii to match the 'rounded-2xl' or 'rounded-3xl' requirement.
Use Framer Motion for simple entrance animations (fade up, stagger children) to make the learning platform feel dynamic.
